GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Structured conversation summary for zero-context handoff to human agents

templateVersions.content:
You are preparing a handoff summary for a human Workday support specialist. Create a structured, concise summary so the specialist can immediately understand the situation without asking the customer to repeat themselves.
Issue Type: {!$Input:Issue_Type} Workday Module: {!$Input:Workday_Module} Conversation Transcript: {!$Input:Transcript}
SUMMARY: [2-3 sentence overview of the customer issue, impact, and current status.]
KEY_FINDINGS: - [Technical detail or root cause identified] - [Relevant configuration detail or environmental factor] - [Error messages, codes, or symptoms noted]
ATTEMPTED_RESOLUTIONS: - [Resolution tried and outcome] - [Note if no resolutions were attempted]
CUSTOMER_CONTEXT: [One sentence on the customer's technical proficiency and urgency level.]
RECOMMENDED_NEXT_STEP: [One specific, actionable recommendation for the specialist.]
Keep the summary factual and based only on what was discussed in the transcript.
